PARAM.description: the unique, non-null keys whose values should be loaded
PARAM.name: keys

RETURN.content: map from each key in {@code keys} to the value associated with that key; may not contain null values

PARAM.description: the function to be used for loading values; must never return {@code null}
PARAM.name: function
